subject: Upgrade to the iPhone 15 Pro, James!
body:
Hi James,

We hope you’re enjoying your iPhone 12! As a valued premium subscriber with us for over 3 years, we want to offer you an exclusive opportunity to upgrade to the latest iPhone 15 Pro.

With your current plan, you can seamlessly transition to this premium device for just £55 a month. The iPhone 15 Pro features an A17 Pro chip for unmatched performance, a stunning 48MP main camera with 3x optical zoom, and a ProMotion 120Hz always-on display that enhances your viewing experience. Plus, with its USB-C and USB 3 speeds, you’ll enjoy faster connectivity than ever.

This upgrade means you’ll benefit from pro-grade camera capabilities, a durable titanium build, and all-day battery life, perfect for your data usage of 45GB a month.

Don’t miss out on this chance to elevate your mobile experience! Click the link below to upgrade now and enjoy the latest technology at your fingertips.

[Upgrade Now]

Best regards,
Your Telco Team
